# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Deploy

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: 'Path to the build script to execute'
        required: true
        type: string
      deploy_command:
        description: 'Deployment command to execute'
        required: true
        type: string

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on:
      - self-hosted
      - datacenter
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Validate build script path
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          case "${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}" in
            scripts/*|./scripts/*)
              ;;
            *)
              echo "Build script must be located under scripts/"
              exit 1
              ;;
          esac
          if [ ! -f "${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}" ]; then
            echo "Build script not found"
            exit 1
          fi
          if [ ! -x "${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}" ]; then
            chmod +x "${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}"
          fi

      - name: Run approved build script
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          "${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}"

      - name: Run approved deploy command
        shell: bash
        env:
          DEPLOY_COMMAND: ${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_command }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          case "$DEPLOY_COMMAND" in
            deploy/*|./deploy/*)
              exec bash -lc "$DEPLOY_COMMAND"
              ;;
            *)
              echo "Deploy command must start with deploy/ or ./deploy/"
              exit 1
              ;;
          esac
